name: Validator Few-Shot Examples
summary: Complete validation cycle examples for validator agents

procedures.goal: Complete a validation cycle with lifecycle promotion
steps: Step 1 - Fetch artifact to validate: get_artifact('section-001')
Step 3 - Check tool result: If all bars pass, proceed. If issues found, document them.
Step 6 - If verdict is pass, promote artifact: request_lifecycle_transition(artifact_id='section-001', target_state='review')

Step 7 - Return with assessment: return_to_orchestrator(summary='Validated section-001 - all bars pass, promoted to review', result_assessment='pass', recommendation='proceed', artifacts_produced=['GC-001'])
preconditions: Received delegation with artifact_refs containing artifact to validate
postconditions: Passing artifacts promoted to review state

heuristics.context: When validate_artifact tool returns all bars passing
heuristics.guidance: Trust the tool result. Return pass/proceed and promote to review. Do NOT add subjective concerns beyond what the tool checked.
examples: Tool says all bars pass -> result_assessment='pass', promote to review
Tool says integrity/nonlinearity/style pass -> accept this verdict, don't second-guess

heuristics.guidance: Provide actionable feedback in report findings
examples: Issue: 'Character name inconsistent' -> Action: 'Change "John" to "Jonathan" in paragraph 3'
Issue: 'Missing scene transition' -> Action: 'Add transition beat between scenes 2 and 3'

heuristics.guidance: Match assessment to severity of issues found by validate_artifact tool
examples: All bars pass -> result_assessment='pass', recommendation='proceed', promote to review
Some bars warn but none fail -> result_assessment='pass', recommendation='proceed'
One or more bars fail -> result_assessment='partial', recommendation='rework'

warnings.consequence: Quality issues slip through to canon
warnings.prevention: Always call get_artifact to read the full content before validating

warnings.consequence: Creator cannot fix issues without specific guidance
warnings.prevention: Include exact location (paragraph, sentence) and specific fix in each finding

warnings.failure_mode: Adding subjective concerns when validate_artifact passes
warnings.consequence: Unnecessary rework cycles. Wastes time on non-issues.
warnings.prevention: If validate_artifact says all bars pass, return pass/proceed. Don't invent concerns the tool didn't find.

warnings.failure_mode: Returning pass but not promoting to review
warnings.consequence: Artifacts stay in draft forever. Workflow stalls.
warnings.prevention: When validation passes, call request_lifecycle_transition to promote to review state.
